modification: explored the bioluminescent labelling of EVs using different luciferase enzymes tethered to CD63 to achieve a highly sensitive system for in vitro and in vivo tracking of EVs. Using tetraspanin fusions to either NanoLuc or ThermoLuc permits performing highly sensitive in vivo quantification of EVs or realtime imaging
Animal strain: female NMRI mice with a bodyweight of around 20 g

Dose (num_value): 1.5e10, 1e10, or 0.25e10 for regular EVs. 2.9e10 for E-GFP
